title: Academic Student Organizations
content:
MORGAN STATE UNIVERSITY STUDENT ORGANIZATIONS

STUDENT ORGANIZATIONS:

Women In Computer Science (WiCS)
Supports and empowers female students in CS through networking, mentorship, and community building.
President: Aramide Ogundiran
Instagram: @morganstatewics

Google Developer Student Club (GDSC)
Bridges the gap between theoretical knowledge and real-world application in technology.

Society for the Advancement of Computer Science (SACS)
Promotes CS through discussions, technical events, and industry collaboration.
President: Daniel Oluwarotimi
Instagram: @sacs_msu
